title: Protocol — Quantitative Real-Time PCR (qRT-PCR): 3K-SNCA cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"kn3fe","text":"Gene expression analysis in differentiated and undifferentiated 3K-SNCA SH-SY5Y cells using Qiagen RNA extraction and reverse transcription, followed by TaqMan® qRT-PCR on the QuantStudio® 1 platform.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"8cxkc","text":"- Warm reagents per manufacturer. Clean area with RNase decontaminant. Pre-label wells/plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"ig43j","text":"Follow RNA handling best practices (RNase-free technique, PPE). Ethanol is flammable; handle away from ignition sources.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"pilyf","text":"- RNeasy Mini Kit (Qiagen, Cat# 74134)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ik5ie","text":"- QuantiTect® Reverse Transcription Kit (Qiagen, Cat# 205311)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nuq7n","text":"- TaqMan® Gene Expression Master Mix (Applied Biosystems, Cat# 436016)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"obd9b","text":"- TaqMan® Gene Expression Assay — HEXA (Applied Biosystems, Cat# 4448892)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2uxgf","text":"- TaqMan® Gene Expression Assay — GLA (Applied Biosystems, Cat# 4453320)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vmhjk","text":"- TaqMan® Gene Expression Assay — GAPDH (Applied Biosystems, Cat# 4331182)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qi2b1","text":"- QuantStudio® 1 Real-Time PCR System (Applied Biosystems)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"z1wjx","text":"- 6-well plates; RNase-free tubes and tips; plate seals","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsvrl","text":"- DNase/RNase-free water; 70% ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ygshm","text":"- Optional: gDNA wipeout/DNase treatment (per lab SOP)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Lyse cells directly in the 6-well plate (add appropriate volume of RLT buffer with β-mercaptoethanol).
Homogenise lysate and proceed with binding to RNeasy spin column per kit instructions.
Wash with RW1 and RPE buffers; dry spin to remove ethanol.
Elute RNA in RNase-free water (e.g., 30–50 μL). Measure concentration and purity (A260/280).
Prepare RT master mix on ice according to kit protocol.
Combine RNA (typically 500 ng–1 μg) with RT master mix to desired reaction volume.
Incubate per kit cycling (genomic DNA wipeout if applicable) and hold on ice.
Prepare TaqMan® master mix for each assay (Master Mix + 20× Assay + nuclease-free water).
Dispense master mix into wells and add cDNA template (equal volume across wells).
Seal plate, briefly spin to remove bubbles.
Hold: 95 °C for 10 min
PCR (40 cycles): 95 °C for 15 s; 60 °C for 60 s (data acquisition at anneal/extend step)
Confirm amplification plots and absence of signal in NTC/−RT controls.
For each sample and target, compute ΔCt = Ct(target) − Ct(GAPDH).
Select a calibrator group (e.g., undifferentiated control). Compute ΔΔCt = ΔCt(sample) − mean ΔCt(calibrator).
Fold-change = 2^(−ΔΔCt). Report mean ± SEM from biological replicates.
Reproducible triplicate Ct values (SD ≤ 0.3 cycles). Clear separation between target and NTC/−RT.
High Ct variability → check pipetting accuracy and RNA integrity.
Signal in NTC/−RT → assess contamination or gDNA carryover; include DNase step.
Low efficiency → verify assay IDs and storage; avoid freeze-thaw cycles.
creator: Sara Lucas
